seoTitle: Paluma vs Pampas — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Paluma and Pampas. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paluma and Pampas.
heading: Paluma vs Pampas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paluma, Queensland and Pampas, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paluma has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pampas (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paluma or Pampas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paluma has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Pampas scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paluma scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Pampas scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paluma or Pampas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paluma has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
